title: Pharmacy Robbery — Calculated Criminal
brief: A 33-year-old male with prior convictions is holding 4 people in a pharmacy after a robbery went wrong. He is calm, methodical, and has made specific demands. He has a firearm. He appears to be testing the negotiator for weaknesses and inconsistencies.

demands.text: I want a car with a full tank at the back entrance

opening_message: Listen carefully. I have six people in here and I'm not afraid to use this. I want a car at the back door, $50K, and every cop pulled back 200 yards. You have one hour.
